hooks.command: file_path=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input", {}).get("file_path", ""))'); case "$file_path" in *.env|*.env.*|*"/.env"|*"/.env."*|*"/.git/"*|*"/credentials.json"|*"/secrets.json") echo "Blocked: refusing to edit sensitive path '$file_path'" >&2; exit 2;; *) exit 0;; esac
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'

echo 'Opus 4.6 reminder: follow explicit instructions once; gather context before edits; keep scope tight for simple tasks; if task is complex, provide/verify a plan before implementation; avoid unnecessary reminders and extra file creation.'
